title: Message Arrows
description: Message Arrows puts nametags on renamed arrows and tridents.
body:
# Message Arrows

Message Arrows puts nametags on renamed arrows and tridents.

<details>
<summary>GIF example of how Message Arrows works</summary>
  
![GIF example of how Message Arrows works](https://s12.gifyu.com/images/SY4VW.gif)
</details>

### Additional informations : 

- The nametag appears all the time when the arrow/trident is on the screen, not just when the player is looking at the arrow/trident (like with player nametags).

- Message Arrows renames arrows shot by dispensers too.

- Message Arrows affects all types of arrows and tridents, but not fireworks. I didn't deem it necessary since fireworks explode after a few seconds. It doesn't work with snowballs, eggs, enderpearls, or any other projectile either.

- Message Arrows only puts a nametag on arrows/tridents with a ``custom_name`` component, and ignores the ``item_name`` component.

- Message Arrows works with colored names.
